channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Former Olympian indicted on felony charge over alleged Reflecting Pool vandalism
item.description: A former Olympian was indicted Thursday on a felony charge in what President Donald Trump has called vandalism of the Reflecting Pool.

item.title: Finding freedom from the heat on July 4th will be a challenge in eastern US
Fire shelters are a key defense for firefighters. But they don’t guarantee survival
